category_sources: source_facts.description identifies nylon as a proxy server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nylon; source_facts.homepage points to the official smeinecke/nylon repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository; its README is the best available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is an official GitHub source-control repository for nylon.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states proxy server; source_facts.executables lists the nylon command.
